channel.title: Policy on Joseph Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in Policy on Joseph Carlson

item.title: Silicon Valley of the East
item.description:
While there are many things which can be deemed questionable coming out of congress, the sanctions preventing acccess to silicon valley technology such as Google Android, Microsoft Windows, and NVIDIA graphics cards are high up on that list in my eyes. It’s actually funny. Necessecity is the mother of invention. We imposed necessity, so they got budy inventing.

To my eyes, the headlines hit the mainstreak with DeepSeek.

DeepSeek was only the beginning.
